title: Ad Approval Readiness V2

checklist.thin_content: WARNING - 503 discovered-not-indexed may include thin pages
checklist.unique_pages: WARNING - must avoid near-duplicate content at scale

adsense_requirements: Substantial original content on every page
Clear navigation, About and Contact pages linked from footer
Privacy policy linked from every page
Max 3 ads per page, ads above fold must not dominate content
action_items: Verify all footer pages live and linked
Run Lighthouse on top 5 calculator pages
Add author/editorial info to data assets
Audit top 50 indexed pages for thin content
Apply for AdSense once 100+ organic visits/day
Set up ad placement zones in template (don't activate until approved)
monetization_target: At $15-25 RPM (finance niche): 1M visitors × 2-3 pageviews = 2M-3M pageviews × $15-25 = $30K-$75K/month. Target $50K/month achievable.
